rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Web Browser Loading Extension

rules.rule_text:
title: Web Browser Loading Extension
id: 81f18c2e-640e-411d-93c0-496bb713003c
status: experimental
description: "During execution, SmashJacker forced Google Chrome or Microsoft Edge\
  \ to open with \nthe command line argument --load-extension so a browser extension\
  \ can install without \nuser interaction. This analytic will likely uncover additional\
  \ adware in an environment \nand may need tuning to take account for acceptable\
  \ software installation. Part of the \nRedCanary 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/smashjacker/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.persistence
- attack.t1176
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith:
    - \chrome.exe
    - \msedge.exe
    CommandLine|contains: --load-extension
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
